SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.bungee

Class BungeeConfig

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.bungee.BungeeConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
VotingPluginProxyConfig
public class BungeeConfig extends Object implements VotingPluginProxyConfig
Configuration implementation for Bungee proxy server.

    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a new BungeeConfig.

    Gets whether to wait for user to be online.

    Gets the vote delay service for a specific site.

    Gets the collection of sites with vote delay configured.

    • configToMap

      public Map<String,Object> configToMap(net.md_5.bungee.config.Configuration config)
      Converts a Configuration object to a Map.
      Parameters:
      config - the configuration to convert
      Returns:
      a map representation of the configuration

    • getProxyBroadcastEnabled

      public boolean getProxyBroadcastEnabled()
      Description copied from interface: VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Gets whether proxy broadcast is enabled.
      Specified by:
      getProxyBroadcastEnabled in interface VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Returns:
      true if proxy broadcast is enabled

    • getProxyBroadcastScopeMode

      public String getProxyBroadcastScopeMode()
      Description copied from interface: VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Routing scope mode. Expected values: PLAYER_SERVER | ALL_SERVERS | SERVERS | ALL_EXCEPT
      Specified by:
      getProxyBroadcastScopeMode in interface VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Returns:
      the scope mode

    • getProxyBroadcastScopeServers

      public List<String> getProxyBroadcastScopeServers()
      Description copied from interface: VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Optional server list used by scope modes SERVERS and ALL_EXCEPT.
      Specified by:
      getProxyBroadcastScopeServers in interface VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Returns:
      the list of scope servers

    • getProxyBroadcastOfflineMode

      public String getProxyBroadcastOfflineMode()
      Description copied from interface: VotingPluginProxyConfig
      What to do when the voting player is offline and scope is PLAYER_SERVER. Expected values: NONE | QUEUE | FORWARD
      Specified by:
      getProxyBroadcastOfflineMode in interface VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Returns:
      the offline mode

    • getProxyBroadcastOfflineForwardServers

      public List<String> getProxyBroadcastOfflineForwardServers()
      Description copied from interface: VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Backend server list used when OfflineMode is FORWARD and Scope.Mode is PLAYER_SERVER. Ignored when Scope.Mode is ALL_SERVERS or ALL_EXCEPT.
      Specified by:
      getProxyBroadcastOfflineForwardServers in interface VotingPluginProxyConfig
      Returns:
      the list of offline forward servers
